understood.

Community Q&A

Questions,
answered.

Is the Radiance Day Cream suitable for skin over 60?
Absolutely — I'm 64 and it's become my morning staple. My dermatologist approved it too. — Verified buyer, Helen T.
Also answered by PURA·E team
Can I use the Calm Barrier Serum while pregnant?
The formula contains no retinoids or salicylic acid. Always check with your midwife. — PURA·E Official
Verified Brand Response
